title: Mace Hammer Overhaul
description: The mace looks like an hammer and 3d
body:
**Hey there!**

Have you heard the news? The Mace has just been unveiled in the latest Snapshot 24w11a for Minecraft! It's an incredible addition—a weapon so powerful that it can take down foes like the Warden and Iron Golem with just one swing!

But let's be honest, the current design of the mace or hammer looks a bit lackluster, doesn't it? It's flat and feeble, lacking the robustness it truly deserves.

The Mojang texture looks like a stone hammer but not a mace

That's why I took it upon myself to create a stunning 3D model for it. Now, we can truly feel the strength and power this weapon embodies!
